reference: 1 KORINTOTENA 10.
hypothesis: Korento

reference: Ɛ na kasee Gyudatena dinɔɔ ya.

hypothesis: Matebia. Mede ya kutosokunukan betu Denanoban. Boslamosesne.

reference: Wurubuarɛ moo ɔ debuŋta wuu wɔ, te ɔ yela ba gyoowɔ ɛpo yayam keŋ man lee.
hypothesis: Oru bara mo odobundauwa do ela ba jowa apoyamako male

reference: Wurubuarɛ ka mo ɔ debuŋta keŋ wuu wɔ, na ɔ ke yela be ka gyoo ɛpo yayam keŋ man lee nɛ, nawolo baa nyi be sɔɔ wɔ Wurubuarɛ loŋ baa te ba bese Mosesi silala.
hypothesis: wubaraka mu oodubutakunwa Nawukera baka jo ewuye amuko manlina ne wulubanye buso wuwura lombatabasu mosesesala

reference: Be popou dii weenɛɛ ŋan ba lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ kaa yala nɛ, te be popou nyɔɔ loŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yeli kɔɔ lee boe keŋ man nɛ.

reference: Mena boe kenaŋ yɛna Kristo gbagba, ŋon na ɔ kpuɛ na wɔ ba keta man nɛ.
hypothesis: muna buye kanyana Kristo gbagba muna opwe na wo bakatama nno

reference: Mɔna be man balaŋ burum nombia ta gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia ya, mena dɔɔ ba yekeewɔ leki depampaa dinaa keŋ man.
hypothesis: Manaba mambala mboromnɔ miata jo ubarasia ya. Manado bayikiwɔle ki dɛ pampadi nako mma.

reference: Be nombia kɛŋa pou yɛɛ kpene keŋ dɛɛ kɛɛ na dɛɛ kasee, na dɔɔ yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ ŋgba baŋ nɛ ya.
hypothesis: No m'ekunapoya kwana kundeke, na de kase, na do yen'ekumengwa bana.

reference: Ɛ na som bɛɛneŋ ŋgba mena keŋ be man baale be yɛɛ nɛ ya.
hypothesis: E na sun bena? Mbe mu na ka bo mamba le bi yɛ na?

reference: Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see yakowɔ nyiaa, “Balaŋ baŋ tisiwɔ kyakee na bee dii na bɛɛ nyɔɔ, te ba korowɔ bɛɛ yɛɛ nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ.
hypothesis: Urubu kenu miangara sese yako nya. Balamba ti suwa chake nambe di, nambe nyo, toba kuro be nu miangara kara.

reference: ” Mena dɔɔ ɛ na yɛɛ kafoŋ ŋgba mena keŋ bɔɔ yɛɛ kafoŋ nombia, te be man balaŋ kakpoŋse saobatooro ba yem wee dokoloŋ nɛ ya.
hypothesis: Minado enaa yakafɔɔ, nwa muna kɔ mbooya kafɔ nɔ miya. Tɛm mambala ka kɔnso sawo turo, bayɛ mwɛɛre kɔlɔ naya.

reference: Tekaboena nyi dɛɛ teese Wurubuarɛ nɔɔman, ŋgba mena keŋ be man baale be yɛɛ te ɔ be yeli doma be kaa koe wɔ nɛ ya.
hypothesis: Tɛɛkɛ abu na ŋu detɛ ti su ba rɔnɔ ma. ŋwam na kanbaman bale bie, to bieɛ le duma bo kaakwe wonɛ.

reference: Tekaboena nyi dɛɛ toroŋ ŋgba mena keŋ be man baale ba toroŋ, te Wurubuarɛ be yeli ɔ kpilale ŋon ɔ na koe balaŋ nɛ be kaa koe wɔ nɛ ya.
hypothesis: Te ka abuni da a toron, mgbami na kan bama mbalibatron te urubara bioli okwulalongo ona kwaye balane beka akwayiwone.

reference: Mena nombia kɛŋa pou kɔŋae be dɔɔ na balaŋ ka mo kasee kolo.
hypothesis: Mene nyeme ko nago ko ngayibodo ne balankam kasee ko.

reference: Te be ŋmarase ŋa bo see na baa mo faree daa, nawolo nyi de kyaa debaŋ keŋ tɛɛle kei ne gyu kɔ ɔto nɛ man.
hypothesis: Nèbɔ̀ŋmɔ̀rɔ̀ sùŋ ábɔ́ sɛ́ nɛ̀ bá mɔ̀ fárè dǎ, nɛ̀wúlúnyì, dɛ̀ càdèbànkɔ̀ntɛ̀lì kɛ́né djùkwɔ́tɔ̀ nǎmɔ̀.

reference: Mena dɔɔ nyaŋ walaŋ ŋon ne yɛɛ neŋ nyi n seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ nɛ, kɛɛ n wose nideli keŋ nyi n ba lee yala ya.
hypothesis: Mina do nyom wola ngoni enye insingekekene. Ke osine deli, kenye mbali yala.

reference: Kekɛɛsekɛɛ daale te kɔŋa ta ɛ dɔɔ, keŋ nyi ke dinɔɔ te kɔŋa ta ŋolo dɔɔ see ya.
hypothesis: E kɛsɛ kɛ dalo tɔ kɔngbɔtɛ ɛ dɔ kɛnyɛ kɛ dinɔ tɔ kɔngbɔtɛ ngbɔlɔ dɔɔsi.

reference: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ ne di ɔ nombia dɔɔ, mena dɔɔ ɔ be gyae waa yela kekɛɛsekɛɛ keŋ kela ŋon nɛ kekɔŋ ɛ dɔɔ ya.
hypothesis: Manoo baa ne di unu miado, mona do obia ye wale kiki sekke kan klan wonne, kokon edo ya.

reference: Te akpaa nyi kekɛɛsekɛɛ de kɔŋ ɛ dɔɔ na, waa wola ŋon gbɛɛ keŋ ɛ ka mo seŋ keŋkeŋ na ɛ ke tale di ke dɔɔ.
hypothesis: ta gbuo nnyi ke ke sike dokon e do na wa wule ngbe ke e ka mo sinken ken na e keta diko do

reference: Mena dɔɔ me gyoona kpaakpaa, ɛ lese ɛ wose lee bɛɛneŋ ɔsom man.
hypothesis: Mɛnɛdɔɔ mu jɔna kpakpa. E lise o wosule bɛɛnɛ o sɔma.

reference: Mee kolosi baa fa ɛmɛɛ nyansatena.
hypothesis: Meɛ ko lesi bafa, emɛ nyasa atene.

reference: Ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ gyoo me nombia ŋan man na ɛ ke kɛɛ kpene keŋ mɛɛ yako nɛ.
hypothesis: amee gwaa ejomundonyangama na ekekepne keme yakone

reference: Debaŋ keŋ dee di de Gbeŋgyoo weenɛɛ ŋan ɔ kpa dee di na dɛɛ mo tɔɔse e nɛ, leenɔɔ keŋ dɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ wosefɛɛreŋ gyakaa ke dɔɔ pɛte dɛɛ nyɔɔ lee ke man nɛ, nawolo baa nyi daa na Kristo te yɛɛ dokoloŋ lee ɔ fatabo keŋ dɔɔ.
hypothesis: Bɛɛ kɔn ndɛɛ dɛɛ dɛɛ dɛɛ gbanjɔɔ wɛɛnɛɛn, akwɛ dɛɛ dɛɛ nɛɛ dɛɛ mɔ tɔɔsi nɛ. Linoo kɔn ndɛɛ sɔlɛɛ ubɛrɛɛ wɛɛ sɔ ferɛɛ njaka kɔdɔɔ, patɛdɛɛ nyɔɔli kɔmanɛɛ. Nɛɛwulubanyɛɛ daanɛɛ kristɔɔ tii adɔ kɔlɔɔ, leɛ ofatabɛɛ kɔndɔɔ.

reference: Mena mɔ te bodobodo keŋ dɛɛ kpɛlɛɛ fa dɔŋa nɛ, nawolo baa nyi daa na Kristo te yɛɛ dokoloŋ lee ɔ wosenaane man.

reference: Bodobodo dokoloŋ te dɛɛ mo kpala fa dɔŋa, mena dɔɔ daa balaŋ burum baŋ pou ta bese walaŋ dokoloŋ.

hypothesis: Mabamba mbidi weneng'ambo mudesfoba rane. Bana ubara nabaso walandikolonu.

reference: Mena dɔɔ sena yaa me nombia kɛŋa na wolo baa?
hypothesis: Mina do su na ya munu mi ekang na wuluba

reference: Koa, kpene keŋ mɛɛ wolo yɛna nyiaa, weenɛɛ ŋan bane somra na mo deesi fa banɛɛ nɛ, te yɛɛ nyi Wurubuarɛ te bɛɛ mo deesi fa ya.

reference: Feliŋkumɛɛ te bee deesi fa, mena dɔɔ mɔɔ ne gyae nyi ɛmɛɛ na feliŋkumɛɛ ke yɛɛ dokoloŋ ya.

reference: Ɛ be gyae ɛ ke tale mo de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo leenɔɔ nyɔɔ, na ɛ ka bese mo feliŋkumɛɛ mɔ leenɔɔ nyɔɔ ya.
hypothesis: Nnyɛbɛ aku Talamu de gbonjo krestɔli nɔ nyɔ. Nɛɛ ɛkabɛsumo fɛlɛɛn kume mɔli nɔ nyɔɛ.

reference: Te be gyae ke de nyi ɛ ke di de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo nyefale man, na ɛ ka bese ke di feliŋkumɛɛ mɔ nyefale man ya.
hypothesis: te be ja e kede nyi, e kede de gbenyo Kristi, nyi faluma. Ne e kpa e suke de feli nkume e ma, e nyi faluma.

reference: Dɛɛ gyae baa nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ ka gyeŋ baŋ?

reference: Yaa dɛɛ kɛɛ da wose baa nyi de dana doŋ kela e?

reference: “Gbɛɛ doo nyi dɛɛ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ” mɔna na ŋe popou ne gyae la ke yela dɛɛ bee ya.
hypothesis: mɛdɔnyɛ dɛtaaliɛ kunu kɛma sɛ. Muna nɛgupopo ni dzaalɛ kɛɛlɛ daibii.

reference: Ŋolo na gyae ŋon gbagba wui deeli ya, mɔna waa gyae ɔ tebia wui deeli bo.

reference: Naane kamasɛ keŋ bɛɛ yɔɔ kebu man nɛ ɛ ke tale lɛɛ di, mɔna na bɔɔse naane keŋ dalee na ke yela ŋolo konɔɔ man nombia ke yɔkɔse e ya.

reference: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ne yako nyiaa “Tɛɛle kei na kpene kamasɛ keŋ doo ke man nɛ pou, yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ wui.
hypothesis: Naurinya ubare nu mya ngara se nsenia kunyanya. Teleke na kwene kamba sekunyindo kumana pou, yedi gonye ubare.

reference: Akpaa walaŋ ŋon ɔ te yɛɛ Kristo baale e ya de baake ŋon nyi ɛ kaa di, te ke yɛɛ keŋ ɛ ke di na, ɛ gyu ke di mɔna ɛ na bɔɔse weenɛɛ ŋan dalee na ŋolo konɔɔ man nombia ke yɔkɔse e ya.
hypothesis: A ko wulango, otie e kusebalia, de ba kunye e kadi. Teke ye kun e kadi na eji kedi, mona ena bosu we ne ngan daleyi. Na ngolukonume numbi ya ko yoko sey.

reference: Mɔna akpaa ŋolo de yako ŋon nyi, “Weenɛɛ kɛŋa yɛɛ bane dɛɛ weenɛɛ ŋa na,” lee walaŋ ŋon ɔ be yako ŋon nɛ, na balaŋ akaŋ baŋ konɔɔ man nombia dɔɔ ɛ na di ŋa ya.
hypothesis: Mon apu a n’e ku nnyii, bue ne ke ngye ba ne de, bue nengana, lewa la ngo obe a kunne. Na bala aka ba nko nu ma nu mbya do. E nna di ngya

reference: Na ɛmɛɛ gbagba konɔɔ man nombia dɔɔ ya, mɔna walaŋ ŋon ɔ be yako ŋon nɛ konɔɔ man nombia dɔɔ.
hypothesis: na ememu ko konuma numiado ya mona wala nguo obiakunio ne konuma numiado

reference: Nawolo nyi ŋolo konɔɔ man nombia be gyae ke tale tɔ maŋ gbɛɛ, nyi me na yɛɛ kpene keŋ me dana gbɛɛ nyi maa yɛɛ nɛ ya.
hypothesis: Ne olyenyi nguluku namanyabi yakata altamangbe nyemanya ekona kamadana gbey nyemanya.

reference: Mɔna akpaa me fane fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ te me di weenɛɛ kɛŋa na, woŋ dɔɔ te ŋolo waa bu maŋ fɔɔ lee weenɛɛ kɛŋa kedi dɔɔ?
hypothesis: mɔnɔ ã̀kwà mɛ̀ fɔ̀nɔ́ fɔ̀ wù bɛ̀ɛ̀ kàdà, tɛ̀ mɛ̀dì wɛ̀ nɛ̀kɛ̀ ngànà. Wùndɔ̀ tɔ̀ ngʊ̀ wà bʊ̀ mán fɔ̀ lɩ wɛ̀ nɛ̀kɛ̀ ngɛ̀ kɛ̀ dɩdɔ̀.

reference: Mena dɔɔ kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ne dii yaa ɛ ne nyɔɔ, yaa kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ na, ɛ yɛɛ ŋe popou mo lese Wurubuarɛ yele.
hypothesis: Nɔ kɔnɔ kammaa sakannɛ di, yɛɛ nɛ nyɔɔ yɛɛ kɔnɔ kammaa sakannɛ akɛɛ na. A yɛɛ mupɔ mɔlɛ suubaa yɛɛ.

reference: Ɛ na yeli ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa ke tɔ Gyuda baale, yaa Giriki baale yaa Kristo walaŋ kamasɛ gbɛɛ ya.
hypothesis: Nèile énɛ̀mi àyɛ̀sɛ̀ kùtɔ̀jù dàbàlè yàgrìbàlè yàkrìsìwòlànkàmàsàgbe.

reference: Mena mɔ te mɛɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ maa yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ, na ka gyoo walaŋ kamasɛ sia lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man.
hypothesis: Mɛnamati mɛɛ ká chɛ, mɛɛ yɛkpunu kamma sɛ. Nɛɛkaji wala kamma seseɛ, leɡbe kamma sɛ ma.

reference: Nawolo nyi mɔɔ ne gyae maŋ gbagba me deeli ya, mɔna balaŋ pou deeli te mɛɛ gyae, na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ke nyiŋ lɛɛ ba nyee.
hypothesis: na udru ni mo na jae ma ngu mwa medelia mwana balan pu derite me jae. Na ni gbenjoyi Yesu Kristo ke nyi le banye.

reference: 1 KORINTOTENA 1.
hypothesis: Pa, tɔne janga teka, abiwasi le Korinto tina ne. Korinto tina, inye dokolo.

reference: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon Wurubuarɛ be baake lee ɔ kegyaebii man nyi me kaa yɛɛ ɔ kpilale nɛ, na de dɔɔ Sositene gyaŋ.
hypothesis: Tan kee leeman poor ngoh, u barabi ba kee lee o kee jaa yiima. Nyimu ka ye o kulla le ne. Na da do sosi tene jaa.

reference: Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena dikpii keŋ ɛ kyaa Korinto donɔɔ man, na baŋ pou be kyaa yenaŋ kamasɛ te bɛɛ som de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ daa na wɔ pou Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ.
hypothesis: dɛ́ɛmbɛ́rɛ́ sikídɛ́yɛ́lí yɛ mɛ́ Kristó tiná díkwíkɛ́ɛn, ɛ́tɛ́ ákúrúntídúnómá. Ná bámpóó bɛ́tɛ́ yínɛ́nkámá sɛ́ɛ, tɛbɛ́ɛ́súmdúgbonjóó Yésú Kristó. Muó yɛ́ɛ́ dánópóó gbonjóó ínɛ́.

reference: Wurubuarɛ te tɛɛ Kristo Yesu dɔɔ baake ŋon te ɔ gberaa ayimɛɛ lee ɛ wose man te ɔ desina ŋon see fa ɔ wose.
hypothesis: kuba ti te Kristo Yesu do bakwo nto. Togora yimele osima. To ode si na won se fa o si.

reference: De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon, na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.
hypothesis: de choo uru bare na ni gunjo Yeso Kiristo ba mo be bere e bwele ngwo na ba fa ngwo go se fera

reference: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mɛɛ fane na, mɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee mena keŋ ɔ be tɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo Yesu dɔɔ mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon nɛ dɔɔ.
hypothesis: De banka masa kan me fena na, me fa u barakra, leminako u bu tedo gbe njo Christo Yesu do mu obere bwele nuna do.

reference: Lee mena keŋ ɛmɛɛ na Kristo be yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ dɔɔ, Wurubuarɛ te hiraa ŋon gbɛɛ kamasɛ man.
hypothesis: Mene akene emmene kriso bɛnɔ dɔklɔndɔ, wurba te hira ngbe kamasom.

reference: Ɔ te yeli ɛ ta gyeŋ kekolosi te ɛ nyiŋa nyansa mɔ kpu.
hypothesis: Hotel éta ye nku lisi. Tè enye nga nyam sa mo

reference: Nawolo nyi Kristo nombia ŋan dee kolosi te ɛ be nyii nɛ, ta gyoo ɛ man nideli.
hypothesis: Nɔ̀ lì nì Krìstɔ̀ nɔ̀ mìangà n-dèkùlɔ̀sì tɛ̀bɛ̀ nyìnɛ̀. Tà jùwè mánì dè.

reference: Mena dɔɔ debaŋ kei keŋ ɛ kyaa ɛ ne daa de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu kabese kɔŋ na sibiiyam nɛ, Wurubuarɛ feliŋ kolo anefaŋ daale be kyaa keŋ ɛ te nyiŋa ta ya.
hypothesis: M̀ nà dɔ́ dɔ́ bán kɛ̀ kɛ́ng, ɛ̀ chà̀ ɛ̀ nà dà dɔ́ gbónjo Yesù kábá sùkɔ̀, ná sìn bí yámnɛ. Ùrùbàlɛ́ fɛ̀lɛ̀n kùlò ànnɛ fánn dàlà bichà kɛ́ng, ɛ̀tɛ̀ nyìngɛ́tàyé.

reference: Ŋon gbagba waa yela ɛ ka seŋ keŋkeŋ kelii ɔto, keŋ nyi nombiikum kamasɛ be gyae ke doo ɛ man ya kelii wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa bese kɔŋ.
hypothesis: Mungwa gu wawa ile yaka sinkan kenke lio to. Ke yuno mi kamase buje ko du emanya ke le waka. Tegbenjo Yesu Kristo wabe siko.

reference: Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ lee ɔ nombia wɔle ya nɛ baake na ŋon nyi ɛ kaa yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ na ɔ bu Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ.
hypothesis: Kuro bae hun obele unomi wale ne. Ba kenewuni eka yeneno dokolo, na obu Yesu Kristi. Nwuo oye digonjo ye.

reference: Kristotena ne kale na dɔŋa.
Me tebia Kristotena, me ta mo de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yele mee doo ŋon teree nyiaa, ɛ popou ɛ yako nombii sɛɛ dɔŋa na kekpase be kɔŋ ɛ man ya.
hypothesis: Mè te bi a kristo té nà. Ma tamé dè gbɛnjɔ yè Yesu Kristo yè lè mè dè wun tè rénya. È pèpù è yèkù nɔmì sédɔngà nà, nà kù kwasè bòkù ayi mànga.

reference: Ɛ yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ lee ɛ nyeeman nombia na ɛ kekolosi pou man.
hypothesis: Enye nnononkoonle enyemanomni a nɛɛkukulu spoma

reference: Me tebia, balaŋ baale ta lee Koloe dekpaŋalaŋ man kaa yako maŋ nyi kale doo ya nsana.
hypothesis: Maté bia balambalata le kole kpanama kae komanye kale du yan sa

reference: Me woŋ faa la keŋ nyi maa di balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ ya nɛ nombia?
hypothesis: Mbon fala kyi nye, madi balambamba tie tuso tina waye nne nye.

reference: Mɔna ɛmɛɛ Kristotena dɔɔ, kaboena nyi yaa di dɔŋa nombia.
hypothesis: Mane ame Kristo ti na do, kabuna yade doga no mi.

reference: Baŋ ba te yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ ya nɛ dɔɔ, Wurubuarɛ ne gyae la waa di be nombia.
hypothesis: Bamba tiye kusu tina wena do, rubala nu njare wa dibinu me.
